spec_section.title: Extended Session Keepalive
spec_section.text: The ECU shall maintain extended diagnostic session only while tester present messages are received within the configured interval.
spec_section.normalized_text: The ECU shall maintain extended diagnostic session only while tester present messages are received within the configured interval.

note_request.title: Extended session keepalive note
note_request.summary: Extended session persistence depends on tester present cadence.

requirement_request.title: Maintain extended session on tester present cadence
requirement_request.statement: The ECU shall maintain extended diagnostic session only while tester present messages are received within the configured interval.

test_requirement_request.statement: Verify the ECU exits extended diagnostic session when tester present cadence is violated.
acceptance_criteria: Extended session remains active while tester present cadence is valid
ECU exits extended session when cadence is violated
